_You_don't_need_to_unerscore_between_words._That's_so_that_field_can_be_highlighted_and_replaced_easily._

_NOTE: the FlexWord wordlist does not include proper names, acronyms, abbreviations or phrases._

### Add one word per line. Use {} to enclose any comments.

(_example word—remove before committing_)

eeling {to colect eels, similar to fishing}
